title: Crispy Cherry Chicken Gyoza
description: A Japanese-inspired dish that combines crispy gyoza with a sweet and savory cherry sauce, perfect for a quick dinner.
instructions: In a large pan, heat 1 tablespoon of sesame oil over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the pan and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the cherry jam, soy sauce, and 1 tablespoon of water to the pan. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened.
Meanwhile, place the flatbread pieces on a baking sheet and bake for 5-7 minutes, or until crispy.
Remove the flatbread from the oven and top each piece with a spoonful of the cherry chicken mixture.
Return the flatbread to the oven and bake for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the filling is heated through.
Garnish with green onions and serve immediately.
